content.text: This page summarizes the guidelines for use of Safety in Projects that is based on Taiji platform

items: Keep all Safety module in Core 0. Even though we have two cores with lock step, to make the architecture simple we shall keep all safety components in Core 0

content.text: This is just a guideline, but if project has performance issue and really need Core 1. still Taiji supports this use case.

items: All safety components variables must be located in Core 0 memory. Since only core 0 memory is protected with BUS MPU

content.text: If we need to use Core 1 memory, then BUS MPU and its FIT test cases has to be implemented

items: Always use context switcher module for trusted functions to access ASIL API from QM context. Do not configure direct trusted API in configurator -> Context Switcher - Introduction and How To Configure - XC-CT China - Docupedia (bosch.com)
Service External WDG from Core 0 and internal WDG for all cores
